message:
🌱 Add thanos: Ability to require tenant in queries mission (#776)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "thanos-3822-ability-to-require-tenant-in-queries",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "thanos: Ability to require tenant in queries",
+    "description": "Ability to require tenant in queries. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current thanos deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your thanos version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nhelm list -n thanos 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working thanos installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos\n```\n### Is your proposal related to a problem?\n\nThe most questions we get about Thanos are around multi tenancy, and I think it's worth considering that we could have more first class multi tenancy features. This is about the query path."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Ability to require tenant in queries",
+        "description": "Fixes [#3822](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/3822) Related to [Proposal](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/4055)\nWe take the tenant header and replace the tenant label if specified in the query, if not just append it in prometheus label matches using [enforceMatcher](https://github.com/prometheus-community/prom-label-proxy/blob/38b1382d7368e994e39c0cb853f3f3c9300f5045/injectproxy/enforce.go#L114)(helper function defined in prom-label proxy). Then these labels are further used\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Ability to require tenant in queries\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Fixes [#3822](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/3822) Related to [Proposal](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/4055)\nWe take the tenant header and replace the tenant label if specified in the query, if not just append it in prometheus label matches using\n\nSee the source issue and linked PR for the complete solution details.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "thanos",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "thanos"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/3822",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/4141"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 24,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "thanos"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with Thanos deployed (sidecar, query, store gateway, compactor as needed). The thanos binary provides subcommands for each component."
+  },
